CYTOGENETICS
KARYOTYPING BY G-BANDING (BLOOD LYMPHO CULTURE)
SPECIMEN
WHOLE BLOOD
INDICATIONS
-
CELLS COUNTED & ANALYSED
20
CELLS KARYOTYPED
06
KARYOTYPE
46,XY (ISCN 2024)
DIAGNOSIS: NORMAL MALE KARYOTYPE
INTERPRETATION:
Chromosomal analysis (GTG-Banding with 500 band resolution) following
stimulated cell culture techniques revealed a normal male karyotype
without apparent numerical and structural chromosomal abnormality or
rearrangement in all the metaphases analysed at the band resolution
achieved.
RECOMMENDATION:
Kindly correlate the report with clinical and other laboratory
investigations.
METHOD : KARYOTYPING

Test Report Status
Units
Interpretation(s)
KARYOTYPING BY G-BANDING (BLOOD LYMPHO CULTURE)-Peripheral Blood Lymphocyte Culture is PHA-stimulated cell culture used to detect numerical and structural
chromosomal abnormalities in postnatal cases with history of physical abnormalities, IQ/learning related disabilities, delayed/absence of menarche, in individuals with bad
obstretic history etc. A normal male has 46,XY  karyotype and a normal female has 46,XX karyotype. The karyotype is designated according to International System For
Human Cytogenetic Nomenclature  (ISCN-2024).
Test Method: Karyotype
Note: The analysis is based on the sample received in the laboratory. This Report is only for the benefit of the patient and treating doctor. No part of this should be
published or quoted without the permission of the signatory/Organisation. This report is not valid for medico legal purpose.
**End Of Report**
Please visit www.agilusdiagnostics.com for related Test Information for this accession
